nonBlockingIssues.description: CLI tsconfig has both noEmit:true and outDir:./dist — contradictory. The bin entry points to ./dist/index.js which won't exist after 'tsc' build. Will need fixing when CLI build pipeline is set up.
Unrelated .claude/settings.local.json changes (6 WebFetch domains for research) included in the monorepo conversion commit. No functional impact.
Pre-commit hook only runs lint-staged in apps/web/. As packages/cli/ grows, commits touching only CLI files won't be linted. Should be extended when CLI has linting configured.

CLI tests re-create the Commander program in each test rather than importing the actual program from src/index.ts. Tests verify Commander.js API behavior but don't directly test the real program configuration. Should be refactored when CLI grows.
vitest.config.ts sets globals:true but test file explicitly imports { describe, it, expect } from 'vitest'. Minor inconsistency.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add commit hygiene guideline: each commit should address a single concern. Unrelated changes (e.g., IDE settings, research domain allowlists) should be in separate commits.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature monorepo-convert included .claude/settings.local.json changes (WebFetch domain permissions for CLI/MCP research) in the monorepo conversion commit.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Soften TDD requirement in scaffold-worker skill for pure config/scaffold features. Current wording 'Write tests first for any testable logic' is too rigid for scaffold work where dependencies must be installed before tests can import them, and Commander.js setup doesn't lend itself to red-green-refactor.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature monorepo-cli-skeleton worker created src/index.ts before the test file. Deviation is justified for scaffold work but contradicts skill step 3.

rejectedObservations.observation: Worker correctly followed scaffold-worker procedure (checked state, implemented scaffolding, verified tooling). Skill feedback was positive.
All shared state files (AGENTS.md, services.yaml, library/) are consistent with post-monorepo layout.
Worker correctly handled packageManager quirk (bun install re-adding it). Did not commit the field.
rejectedObservations.reason: Already documented in AGENTS.md known issues — no update needed
